libsource.description: 6522 NMOS Versatile Interface Adapter (VIA), 20-pin I/O, 2 Timer/Counters, DIP-40
Positive 1A 35V Linear Regulator, Fixed Output 5V, TO-220
Push button switch, generic, two pins
Generic connector, double row, 02x16, odd/even pin numbering scheme (row 1 odd numbers, row 2 even numbers), script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Generic connector, single row, 01x02, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Generic connector, double row, 02x16, odd/even pin numbering scheme (row 1 odd numbers, row 2 even numbers), script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
6551 NMOS Asynchronous Communication Interface Adapter (ACIA), Serial UART, DIP-28
Push button switch, generic, two pins
Generic connector, single row, 01x03, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Generic connector, single row, 01x03, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
Generic connector, single row, 01x03, script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)
